**Current Environment**
- **Primary Model ID**: (e.g., claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620)
- **OpenClaw Version**: (e.g., 2026.3.13)
- **Workspace Size**: (e.g., 15MB / 45 files)

**Observed Strategy**
The optimizer selected strategy: `[Full / Semantic / Window]`
The selected chunkSize was: `[e.g., 4000]`

**Feedback**
- [ ] Retrieval was accurate.
- [ ] Context fragmentation detected (hallucinations).
- [ ] Model struggled with large chunk size.

**Suggested Tuning**
